inputs: The geo data was collected over http and stored in the meta section.
SSL certificates provide secure connections over HTTP.
Whois information can reveal domain ownership details.
The meta tags contain important metadata for search engines.
HTTP requests are used to fetch web pages.
outputs: The geolocation data was collected over hypertext transfer protocol and stored in the metadata section.
Secure sockets layer certificates provide secure connections over hypertext transfer protocol.
Who is information can reveal domain ownership details.
The metadata tags contain important metadata for search engines.
Hypertext transfer protocol requests are used to fetch web pages.
